channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ECORECO] Eco Recycling revises acquisition value to ₹193 Lacs; approves Q4 results
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Eco Recycling Ltd has issued a revised outcome for its Board Meeting held on April 27, 2026. The key revision involves rectifying the value of a proposed transaction from ₹1.93 Lacs to ₹193 Lacs, as per clause 4 of Annexure II. This transaction pertains to the acquisition of the remaining stake in M/s Ecoreco Park Private, which will make it a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of Eco Recycling Ltd. Additionally, the Board of Directors approved the Audited Financial Results for the fourth quarter and the financial year ended March 31, 2026, on both Standalone and Consolidated bases.

  • Eco Recycling revised a transaction value from ₹1.93 Lacs to ₹193 Lacs.
  • The revision relates to the acquisition of remaining stake in Ecoreco Park Private.
  • Ecoreco Park Private will become a Wholly Owned Subsidiary.
  • Board approved Audited Financial Results for Q4 and FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ECO RECYCLING LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SHYAMMETL] Shyam Metalics Board to meet May 11 for Q4/FY26 results, dividend, capex
item.description:
Shyam Metalics and Energy Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on Monday, May 11, 2026. The primary agenda includes considering and approving the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the Board will consider and recommend a final dividend, if any, for the financial year 2025-26, and discuss future Capital Expenditure (Capex) announcements. In compliance with insider trading regulations, the trading window for the company's securities has been closed for designated persons and their immediate relatives from April 1, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the financial results are declared.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 11, 2026.
  • Q4 and FY26 audited financial results to be considered and approved.
  • Board to consider and recommend a final dividend for FY26.
  • Future capital expenditure announcements are also on the agenda.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shyam Metalics and Energy Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ZAPPFRESH] DSM Fresh Foods incorporates Varuna Aquatech, acquires 70.96% stake
item.description:
🔥 Trending

DSM Fresh Foods Ltd has announced the incorporation of its new subsidiary, Varuna Aquatech Private Limited, on April 27, 2026. The company acquired a 70.96% shareholding in Varuna Aquatech for a cash consideration of ₹70,960. Varuna Aquatech will operate in the aquaculture, fisheries, and food processing industry, focusing on activities like breeding, farming, processing, and trading of aquatic organisms. This strategic move is in line with DSM Fresh Foods' expansion strategy to diversify and strengthen its presence in the food sector.

  • DSM Fresh Foods incorporated Varuna Aquatech Private Limited as a subsidiary.
  • The subsidiary will operate in the aquaculture and food processing industry.
  • DSM Fresh Foods acquired a 70.96% stake for ₹70,960 cash.
  • This move supports the company's expansion strategy into new sectors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DSM Fresh Foods Ltd | Category: Subsidiary

item.title: [BHEL] BHEL Board to Consider Final Dividend for FY26 on May 4, 2026
item.description:
Bharat Heavy Electricals Ltd (BHEL) has announced that its Board of Directors will hold a meeting on May 4, 2026. The agenda for this meeting includes, among other items, the consideration and recommendation of a final dividend for the financial year 2025-26. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations & Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and follows a prior communication dated April 27, 2026. The potential recommendation of a final dividend is a key event for investors, reflecting the company's financial performance and capital allocation strategy.

  • BHEL Board meeting scheduled for May 4, 2026.
  • Board to consider final dividend recommendation for FY26.
  • Decision on dividend impacts shareholder returns.
  • Meeting is in compliance with SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHARAT HEAVY ELECTRICALS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AHLUCONT] Ahluwalia Contracts: Share Capital Audit Report as of Mar 31, 2026
item.description:
Ahluwalia Contracts (India) Ltd has released its Reconciliation of Share Capital Audit Report for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The report confirms that the company's total issued and listed capital stands at 6,69,87,560 shares, each with a face value of ₹2. A significant majority, 99.92%, of the shares are held in dematerialized form, with 95.90% (6,42,39,857 shares) in NSDL and 4.02% (26,96,319 shares) in CDSL. Only 0.08% (51,384 shares) are held in physical form. The report indicates no differences between issued/listed capital and total shares, no changes in capital during the quarter, and no dematerialization requests pending beyond 21 days. The Register of Members is updated.

  • Total issued and listed capital stands at 6,69,87,560 shares.
  • 99.92% of shares are held in dematerialized form (NSDL and CDSL).
  • Only 0.08% of shares are held in physical form.
  • No capital changes or pending demat requests reported for the quarter.
  • The company's Register of Members is fully updated.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AHLUWALIA CONTRACTS (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [MANSIFIN] Mansi Finance: SEBI Reg 32(1) on fund use not applicable for Q4 FY26
item.description:
Mansi Finance (Chennai) Ltd has disclosed that Regulation 32(1) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, is not applicable for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This regulation pertains to the statement of deviation or variation for proceeds from public, rights, or preferential issues. The company confirmed that no such fundraising activities occurred during the specified quarter, thus rendering the requirement for such a statement moot. This filing ensures compliance with SEBI circulars regarding disclosure norms.

  • SEBI Regulation 32(1) is not applicable to the company.
  • No public, rights, or preferential issues were undertaken in Q4 FY26.
  • Company confirms compliance with SEBI disclosure requirements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MANSI FINANCE (CHENNAI) LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [INNOVATORS] Innovators Facade Systems wins ₹76.82 Cr Lodha project
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Innovators Facade Systems Ltd has secured a Letter of Award from Lodha Developers Limited for facade works at the Lodha Worli Sea Face Project in Mumbai. The order, valued at ₹76.82 Crores (excluding taxes), involves the design, supply, and installation of facade works for the project's tower and clubhouse. The estimated completion period for this domestic contract is two years. The company confirmed that there is no promoter/promoter group interest in the awarding entity, nor does the transaction fall under related party transactions. This significant order is expected to contribute to the company's revenue pipeline over the next two years.

  • Innovators Facade Systems secured a ₹76.82 Cr order.
  • Order from Lodha Developers for Mumbai facade works.
  • Project involves design, supply, and installation.
  • Estimated completion period is two years.
  • No related party transaction or promoter interest.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Innovators Facade Systems Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [USGTECH] USG Tech Solutions clarifies no undisclosed info behind price surge
item.description:
USG Tech Solutions Ltd responded to a stock exchange inquiry regarding significant price movement in its securities. The company clarified that it is not aware of any specific event, information, or impending announcement that could explain the recent price behavior. USG Tech Solutions affirmed its compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, having promptly disclosed all material events. The company stated it possesses no unpublished price sensitive information or material developments that have not been disclosed, attributing the price movement solely to market forces beyond its control.

  • USG Tech Solutions received inquiry on price movement.
  • Company denies knowledge of specific reasons for price change.
  • Confirms compliance with SEBI disclosure regulations.
  • States no undisclosed price sensitive information exists.
  • Attributes price movement to market forces.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: USG TECH SOLUTIONS LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [GMBREW] GM Breweries sets May 27, 2026 as record date for FY26 dividend
item.description:
GM Breweries Ltd has announced Thursday, May 27, 2026, as the record date for the purpose of determining shareholders eligible for the final dividend for the financial year 2025-2026. This decision is in compliance with Section 91 of the Companies Act, 2013, and Regulation 42 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Shareholders holding shares on this specific date will be entitled to receive the final dividend.

  • GM Breweries fixed the record date for its final dividend.
  • The record date is May 27, 2026, for FY2025-2026 dividend.
  • Shareholders on record date will be eligible for dividend payment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: G.M.BREWERIES LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [AFIL] Akme Fintrade Board to meet May 6 for Q4/FY26 results
item.description:
Akme Fintrade (India) Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on Wednesday, May 06, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, along with the Auditor's Report. Additionally, the trading window for dealing in the company's shares remains closed from April 01, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the financial results are declared.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 6, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026.
  • Window reopens 48 hours post-results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Akme Fintrade (India) Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
